spell.more_iss.flame_ray.guide: Fires a blazing ray forward, heavily igniting targets hit for several seconds.
spell.more_iss.solar_ray.guide: Shoots a compressed beam of sunlight. Gradually melts the target's armor, reducing armor value and durability. Effect increases with consecutive hits.
spell.more_iss.holy_ray.guide: Fires a sacred beam that deals bonus damage to undead mobs.
spell.more_iss.void_ray.guide: Emits a dense purple beam infused with void energy. Boasts superior range compared to other ray spells.
spell.more_iss.spectal_ray.guide: Fires a pale, translucent beam. Causes summoned mobs to focus their attention on the target.
spell.more_iss.ender_shooting_star.guide: Launches a barrage of magic missiles like a meteor shower.
spell.more_iss.raisen.guide: Pierces the target with six lightning spears.
spell.more_iss.absolute_zero.guide: Releases a wave of absolute zero, damaging enemies and heavily slowing them. Also summons multiple ice phantoms in concentric circles that shatter and fire icicles upon disappearing.
spell.more_iss.providential_conduit.guid: Transfers all beneficial buffs from the caster to the target. Duration scales with spell level and magic power.
spell.more_iss.sacrificial_edge.guide: Applies a self-inflicted damage-over-time effect. Casting again unleashes a powerful blood slash proportional to the total damage taken.
spell.more_iss.overburst_blood.guide:
An unknown scroll that fuses charged magic with the price of cardiac arrest, triggering a violent blood eruption.
Greatly boosts attack power and allows attacks to ignore all defenses.
spell.more_iss.freischutz.guide: Forms a pact with a demon, loading 7 homing bullets. If all bullets are fired within the contract duration, retribution will follow.
spell.more_iss.soul_link.guide: A mysterious spell that links the souls of the caster and the target.
spell.more_iss.heavenly_blast.guide: Calls down multiple divine spears of light from the sky, incinerating enemies in a wide area.
ui.more_iss.freischutz.penalty_trigger: You cannot form a new contract while under demonic retribution.
ui.more_iss.freischutz.exhausted_penalty: All bullets expended. Demonic retribution is imminent.
ui.more_iss.freischutz.bypass_penalty: §cYou cannot escape the contract. Absolute demonic enforcement has been invoked.
ui.more_iss.freischutz.illegal_remove_pe: §cRetribution cannot be denied or removed. Absolute demonic enforcement has been invoked.
death.attack.sacrificial_purge: %1$s's blood ruptured under overwhelming magical power.
spell.more_iss.mark_of_detonation.guide: Fires a firebolt that applies a mark. Targets with 3 marks explode.
spell.more_iss.frost_armor.guide: Envelops the caster in armor that converts incoming damage into absorption hearts.
spell.more_iss.unfading.guide: Creates an area that cleanses poison and decay effects.
spell.more_iss.disintegration.guide: Locks onto a target while channeling, then destroys it at a quantum level upon release. Ignores all defenses and even bypasses immortality.
spell.more_iss.funnel.guide: Launches into the air and fires a barrage of projectiles that bombard the target area.
death.attack.more_iss.disintegration: %1$s was disintegrated at the atomic level, their soul ascending to the heavens.
death.attack.more_iss.disintegration.pla: %1$s was disintegrated at the atomic level by %2$s, their soul ascending to the heavens.
spell.more_iss.napalm_rain.guide: Scatters numerous bombs, dealing fire and explosive damage to nearby mobs.
spell.more_iss.phoenix_blessing.guide: Grants a phoenix's blessing, reviving the caster upon death and providing multiple buffs.
spell.more_iss.meteor_fall.description: Calls down a rain of meteors from above.
spell.more_iss.polychromatic_beam.guide: Fires a rainbow beam imbued with ice, fire, and arcane energy, damaging enemies in its path.
spell.more_iss.glacial_execution.guide: Summons a massive ice greatsword to strike down enemies ahead.
spell.more_iss.polychromatic_lance.guide: Throws a rainbow lance infused with ice, fire, and arcane power.
